codeReview.summary: The feature implementation addresses the requested M2 fixes end-to-end: project-scoped traceability API routes were added, auto-linkage now assigns category-aware files in generator mode, broken path detection is surfaced via API/UI, git remote detection enables GitHub navigation, and visual link state indicators were added. One non-blocking robustness issue remains in GitHub URL construction.

issues.description: GitHub links are hardcoded to `/blob/main/`; repositories with a different default branch will generate broken navigation links. Deriving branch/ref dynamically (or using commit SHA when available) would make this resilient.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The integration-worker skill requires agent-browser verification when UI is affected, but this worker changed UI files and appears not to have invoked agent-browser.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/integration-worker/SKILL.md:22 and :41 require agent-browser for UI changes; transcript skill extraction for session f4294953-6e19-4c01-9104-159e6424a17e returned only ['mission-worker-base', 'integration-worker'] with has_agent_browser=false.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture knowledge is now stale about traceability endpoints after this feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:73 states traceability is only `/api/traceability` (not project-scoped), while lib/bropilot/api/router.ex:158-166 now defines `/api/projects/:project_path/traceability` routes.

summary: Reviewed commit 58ca0a9 for misc-fixes-2 against feature scope and transcript evidence. Implementation satisfies the targeted validation failures with one non-blocking GitHub-link branch assumption; overall review status is pass.
